dev.heading:
Web
Development
dev.summary: {webDevYears} years of coding applications and building for the web.
dev.description: From legacy server systems to modern web stacks and frameworks. Now specializing in building statically generated sites and web applications using Astro and Svelte, or SvelteKit. Have not yet found a web project that could not be built using these frameworks as a base. In my experience, nothing else delivers that level of performance with fewer headaches.

arnis.heading:
Filipino
Martial Arts
arnis.summary: {fmaPracticeYears} years of practice in the art of Lapunti Arnis de Abanico.
arnis.description: Wandered the halls of different martial arts schools prior to all that. Found the art that I will practice for the rest of my life in Lapunti Arnis De Abanico. While taking valuable lessons from other disciplines, I am now on a path that my teachers set me on, and that they themselves have embarked on. A path towards finding my own Lapunti.
